content:
:wave: how many releases back will a critical security fix be backported?

We're using Wasmtime 38 and noticed some performance regressions in Wasmtime 39 and forward.
You can see a table here for that, notably 24.0.x, 36.0.x, 42.0.x, and 43.0.x are currently candidates for security fixes. No other releases have security fixes provided at this time
